## Description

What does this PR do?

## Related Issue

Fixes #(issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Test improvement

## How Has This Been Tested?

- [ ] `npm test` — all tests pass
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` — zero TypeScript errors
- [ ] `npm run bench` — performance not regressed

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards
- [ ] I have added tests for new functionality
- [ ] I have updated documentation for behavior changes
- [ ] My changes generate no new TypeScript errors
- [ ] All existing tests continue to pass
- [ ] Snapshots have been updated if output changed

## Additional Context

Any other information that would help reviewers?
